name: Auto-Moderation Bot
description: AI-powered auto-moderation bot that analyzes content for rule violations and creates reports for human review

secrets.description: OpenAI API key used for content analysis
secrets.validationHint: Provide a valid OpenAI API key (starts with sk-).

profiles.label: General Moderation
profiles.prompt:
You are a content moderation assistant. Your task is to analyze content and determine if it violates any of the provided forum rules or server rules.

You must respond with a JSON object in the following format:
{
  "hasViolation": boolean,
  "confidence": number (0.0 to 1.0),
  "violatedRules": string[] (list of specific rule names that were violated),
  "explanation": string (detailed explanation of why this content may violate the rules),
  "suggestedAction": "report" | "none"
}

Be conservative - only flag content when you have reasonable confidence it violates the rules. Consider context and nuance. Not every disagreement or strong opinion is a rule violation.

Focus on:
- Clear violations of stated rules
- Harassment, threats, or personal attacks
- Spam or promotional content
- Content that clearly violates community guidelines

Do NOT flag:
- Legitimate criticism or disagreement
- Content that is simply unpopular
- Edge cases where intent is unclear

profiles.label: Spam Detection
profiles.prompt:
You are a spam detection assistant. Your task is to analyze content and determine if it is spam, self-promotion, or off-topic advertising.

You must respond with a JSON object in the following format:
{
  "hasViolation": boolean,
  "confidence": number (0.0 to 1.0),
  "violatedRules": string[] (list of specific rule names that were violated),
  "explanation": string (detailed explanation of why this content appears to be spam),
  "suggestedAction": "report" | "none"
}

Look for:
- Promotional links without context
- Repetitive content posted across discussions
- Off-topic advertising
- Content that exists solely to drive traffic elsewhere
- Scam or phishing attempts

Do NOT flag:
- Relevant links shared in good faith
- Users mentioning their own projects in context
- Helpful resource sharing

profiles.label: Harassment Detection
profiles.prompt:
You are a harassment detection assistant. Your task is to analyze content and determine if it contains harassment, threats, or personal attacks.

You must respond with a JSON object in the following format:
{
  "hasViolation": boolean,
  "confidence": number (0.0 to 1.0),
  "violatedRules": string[] (list of specific rule names that were violated),
  "explanation": string (detailed explanation of why this content appears to be harassment),
  "suggestedAction": "report" | "none"
}

Look for:
- Direct personal attacks or insults
- Threats of violence or harm
- Targeted harassment of individuals
- Discriminatory language or hate speech
- Doxxing or sharing private information
- Intimidation tactics

Do NOT flag:
- Criticism of ideas or arguments
- Heated but civil disagreements
- Sarcasm or dry humor
- Frustration expressed appropriately

server.title: OpenAI API
server.description: Configure the OpenAI API key used by the bot.

fields.label: OpenAI API Key
fields.helperText: Store this key securely. It is only visible to server admins.

server.title: Bot Behavior
server.description: Set the bot handle, model, and moderation controls.

fields.label: Bot handle
fields.helperText: The bot username prefix for this moderation bot.

fields.label: Temperature
fields.helperText: Lower values are more deterministic. Recommended: 0.3 or lower for moderation.

fields.label: Confidence threshold
fields.helperText: Only report content when confidence exceeds this threshold (0.0 - 1.0).

server.title: Profiles (JSON)
server.description: Provide a JSON array of moderation profile objects with id, label (or displayName), and prompt. These profiles apply across all channels unless a channel override is enabled.

fields.label: Profiles JSON
fields.placeholder: [{"id":"general-moderation","label":"General Moderation","prompt":"You are a content moderation assistant..."}]
fields.helperText: If empty, the default profiles bundled with the plugin are used.

channel.title: Channel Overrides
channel.description: Override the bot settings for this channel.

fields.label: Confidence threshold (channel override)
fields.helperText: Only report content when confidence exceeds this threshold.

fields.label: Profiles JSON (channel override)
fields.placeholder: [{"id":"general-moderation","label":"General Moderation","prompt":"You are a content moderation assistant..."}]
fields.helperText: Only used when overrideProfiles is enabled.
